bullets: Welcome back to Below the Surface. Today we're talking about marine biology, and I'm joined by Hanna Crebo Rediker, marine biologist focused on reef systems. Hanna Crebo Rediker, thanks for being h…
Before we get into it — Marco Sylva was on last week talking about wreck planning.
Yeah, exactly. And it ties into what we're covering today.
